attachment.content:
- skillarchitecturearumed: Use this skill for the complete Arumed Apps architecture reference: full folder tree (backend Laravel 13.8 + frontend Vue 3.5), ~310 API endpoints across 20 module groups (auth, anjungan-kiosk-public, antrean-tv-public, antrian-cross-cutting, admisi, perawat, refraksi, dokter, penunjang, bedah, farmasi, kasir, klaim BPJS, rekam-medis, dashboard, master, tarif-paket, **inventori-farmasi (supplier/pembelian/penerimaan/harga)**, integrasi, jadwal-dokter, rbac), 96 database migrations grouped per domain, 15 Pinia stores, axios interceptor pattern, BPJS integration points (VClaim/Antrean/iCare/INA-CBGs), Satu Sehat sync, Anjungan Mandiri Kiosk (walk-in flow with placeholder Patient + merge endpoint), **RBAC matrix (23 modul × R/W/D = 69 permission, role/permission middleware, Superadmin bypass)**, **Jadwal Dokter mingguan dengan dynamic queue prefix D{room}**, **Inventori Farmasi standalone (master Obat/BHP/IOL + Penentuan Harga HPP/HJA + Supplier + PO + GRN dengan stok per-batch+expiry, auto status PO dari GRN)**, **Tarif & Paket Bedah (insurer TPA parent/child + tarif per-penjamin + paket bedah composite)**, dan centralized Service Flow (Section 11: direct admisi → TR auto, QueueService orchestrates A -> TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS -> D -> P?/B? -> K -> F -> SELESAI with same-day-bedah rule, sentinel transitions, panggil-ulang support, and auto-advance after walk-in registration). Use when answering questions about overall system architecture, endpoint discovery, queue station transitions, gate-validation logic (TR final…
- skillarumedctx: Use this skill for Arumed Apps project context including tech stack, patient flow, module list, API patterns, coding conventions, and integration details. Always use alongside skillarumeddb for complete context. Triggers: any code generation, API design, controller/service creation, or architectural decisions for Arumed Apps.
- skillarumeddb: Use this skill whenever working on Arumed Apps database. Triggers include: generating migrations, models, controllers, services, or any code that involves database tables for the Arumed Apps clinic management system. Also use when asked about table structure, field names, relationships, enum values, or any database-related questions for this project. Contains all 28 tables, field details, relationships, migration order, enum values, and Laravel code patterns.
- ui-ux-pro-max: UI/UX design intelligence. 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content: Launching skill: skillarchitecturearumed

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Lenovo\.claude\skills\skillarchitecturearumed

# Arumed Apps — ARCHITECTURE

> Dokumen arsitektur tingkat-atas untuk **Arumed Apps**, sistem informasi
> klinik mata (Klinik Mata Arunika). Tujuan: jadi pintu masuk pertama
> developer baru — tahu di mana setiap modul tinggal, kontrak API antar
> layer, dan bagaimana frontend Vue berbicara dengan backend Laravel.

---

## 1. Overview

Arumed Apps adalah HIS (Hospital Information System) khusus oftalmologi,
**100% paperless**, dirancang untuk memenuhi PMK No. 24/2022 sekaligus
terintegrasi dengan BPJS (VClaim, Antrean, iCare, INA-CBGs) dan Satu Sehat
(Kemenkes). Sistem terdiri dari **dua deployable** yang hidup di satu repo:

| Aspek         | Backend                            | Frontend                                 |
|---------------|------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Stack         | Laravel 13.8 + PHP 8.3             | Vue 3.5 + Vite 5                         |
| Auth          | JWT (`tymon/jwt-auth` 2.3)         | Bearer token di `localStorage`           |
| Default DB    | SQLite (dev) / PostgreSQL (prod)   | —                                        |
| State mgmt    | Service classes (DI ke controller) | Pinia (composition API style)            |
| Real-time     | Laravel Reverb (event broadcast)   | `pusher-js` (Reverb protocol)            |
| Folder        | `backend/`                         | `arumed-frontend/`                       |
| Dev port      | `:8000` (`php artisan serve`)      | `:5173` (`npm run dev`, proxy `/api`)    |
| Base path API | `/api/v1/*`                        | `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1'` |

Audience dokumen: developer baru, reviewer, integrator (BPJS/Satu Sehat).

---

## 2. Folder Structure

Struktur disusun per-deployable. Komentar inline menjelaskan kenapa folder
itu penting — bukan sekadar nama folder.

```
arumed-apps/
├── backend/                          # Laravel 13.8 — REST API + integrasi eksternal
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── Events/                   # AdmisiQueueUpdated, TriaseQueueUpdated, AntreanTvUpdated (broadcast Reverb)
│   │   ├── Http/Controllers/         # 27 controller per-modul (thin: validate + delegate ke Service)
│   │   ├── Http/Middleware/          # RoleMiddleware + PermissionMiddleware (RBAC gate)
│   │   ├── Models/                   # 72 Eloquent model (dikelompokkan per domain di Section 4.3)
│   │   ├── Services/                 # 28 service — semua business logic & integrasi pihak ketiga
│   │   └── Providers/AppServiceProvider.php
│   ├── bootstrap/app.php             # Bootstrap gaya Laravel 11+ (no Kernel.php) — CORS + apiPrefix=api + middleware alias role/permission
│   ├── config/
│   │   ├── cors.php                  # Izinkan origin dev frontend :5173
│   │   └── database.php
│   ├── database/
│   │   ├── migrations/               # 96 migration (urutan kronologis, lihat Section 7)
│   │   └── seeders/                  # 17 seeder (+ PermissionSeeder + RolePermissionSeeder); default chain (PatientVisitSeeder opsional manual)
│   ├── routes/
│   │   └── api.php                   # Semua endpoint — grup di bawah prefix /v1 (final: /api/v1/*)
│   └── composer.json
└── arumed-frontend/                  # Vue 3 SPA — UI semua modul HIS
    ├── src/
    │   ├── main.js                   # Entry: install Pinia + Router, mount #app
    │   ├── App.vue                   # Root: dengar event arumed:session-expired
    │   ├── router/index.js           # Definisi route + beforeEach (auth guard)
    │   ├── layouts/AppLayout.vue     # Shell: sidebar + topbar + <RouterView/>
    │   ├── views/                    # 18 view (1 view = 1 modul; lihat Section 6.1) — incl. JadwalDokterView
    │   ├── components/layout/        # AppSidebar (permission-filtered menu), AppTopbar, BrandMark (tidak ada UI lib eksternal)
    │   ├── services/api.js           # Axios instance + helper per-domain (authApi, queueApi, dokterApi, refraksiApi, antreanTvApi, jadwalDokterApi, userApi, roleApi, permissionApi, dll)
    │   ├── stores/                   # 11 Pinia store (+ jadwalDokterStore, dataPenggunaStore)
    │   └── assets/styles/            # tokens.css (design token) + base.css (reset + animasi)
    ├── vite.config.js                # Alias @/ → src/; proxy /api → :8000
    ├── package.json
    └── index.html
```

Direktori lain di root (`Docs/`, `assets/`, `skill/`, `hello.js`) bersifat
auxiliary dan tidak masuk runtime aplikasi.

---

## 3. Tech Stack & Dependencies

Bagian ini mengunci versi runtime yang **harus** dipasang sebelum menjalankan
project — gunakan saat onboarding mesin baru atau diagnose error
version-mismatch.

### 3.1 Backend — `backend/composer.json`

```json
"require": {
  "php": "^8.3",
  "laravel/framework": "^13.8",
  "laravel/tinker": "^3.0",
  "tymon/jwt-auth": "^2.3"
},
"require-dev": {
  "fakerphp/faker": "^1.23",
  "laravel/pail": "^1.2.5",
  "laravel/pao": "^1.0.6",
  "laravel/pint": "^1.27",
  "mockery/mockery": "^1.6",
  "nunomaduro/collision": "^8.6",
  "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.5.12"
}
```

Catatan:
- `tymon/jwt-auth` adalah satu-satunya provider auth — `auth:api` guard
  bergantung pada package ini. Wajib jalankan `php artisan jwt:secret`
  sebelum login.
- `laravel/pail` menyediakan `php artisan pail` (log tail real-time, dipakai
  oleh script `composer dev`).

### 3.2 Frontend — `arumed-frontend/package.json`

```json
"dependencies": {
  "vue": "^3.5.0",
  "vue-router": "^4.4.0",
  "pinia": "^2.2.0",
  "axios": "^1.7.0",
  "pusher-js": "^8.5.0"
},
"devDependencies": {
  "vite": "^5.4.0",
  "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.1.0"
}
```

Tidak ada UI library eksternal (Vuetify/Quasar/shadcn) — semua komponen
custom dengan CSS scoped + design token di `src/assets/styles/tokens.css`.

---

## 4. Backend Components

Layer pemisahan: **Routes → Controller (validate + DI service) → Service
(business logic) → Model (Eloquent)**. Service jadi titik sentuh integrasi
eksternal (BPJS, Satu Sehat) supaya controller tetap tipis.

### 4.1 Controllers (`backend/app/Http/Controllers/`)

Semua 27 controller ekstends `App\Http\Controllers\Controller` (base class)
dan menerima service via constructor DI (lihat pola di `AuthController.php`).

| Controller                  | Routes Prefix      | Purpose                                                                  |
|-----------------------------|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `AuthController`            | `/auth/*`          | Login, logout, refresh JWT, profil `/me`, ganti password                  |
| `QueueController`           | `/antrian/*`       | Generic queue ops cross-station — snapshot Antrean TV, advance, panggil   |
| `AdmisiController`          | `/admisi/*` + `/anjungan/*` (public kiosk) | Pendaftaran pasien (full + walk-in merge), kunjungan, cancel, update pasien, antrian admisi, jadwal dokter, BPJS-SEP, **tiket umum kiosk** |
| `PerawatController`         | `/perawat/*`       | Antrian triase + asesmen keperawatan (NurseAssessment), vital history    |
| `RefraksiController`        | `/refraksi/*`      | Antrian refraksi, pemeriksaan refraksi, resep kacamata, rekomendasi IOL  |
| `DokterController`          | `/dokter/*`        | RME dokter (tab2/tab3/tab4), tindakan, resep, order penunjang, TTD       |
| `PenunjangController`       | `/penunjang/*`     | Order + hasil pemeriksaan penunjang (lab, imaging, biometri)             |
| `BedahController`           | `/bedah/*`         | Jadwal operasi, request BHP/IOL, laporan operasi, post-op                |
| `FarmasiController`         | `/farmasi/*`       | Dispensing resep + surgery-request fulfillment. (Stok obat/BHP/IOL pindah ke modul Inventori Farmasi.) |
| `KasirController`           | `/kasir/*`         | Invoice + item billing, COB, watermark, laporan harian                   |
| `KlaimController`           | `/klaim/*`         | Workflow klaim BPJS (DRAFT → REVIEW → VERIFIED → SUBMITTED), INA-CBGs    |
| `RekamMedisController`      | `/rekam-medis/*`   | Riwayat pasien, dokumen (versioning), verifikasi QR                      |
| `DashboardController`       | `/dashboard/*`     | KPI, follow-up tracking, alert stok/BPJS/Satu Sehat                      |
| `MasterDataController`      | `/master/*`        | Profil klinik, pegawai, ICD-9/10, wilayah, prosedur + kategori (autogen TND-NNN), template/jenis/nomor dokumen, stasiun-document mapping. (Tarif tindakan/obat/bhp/iol pindah ke `TarifPaketController`.) |
| `TarifPaketController`      | `/tarif-paket/*`   | Tarif per-penjamin (tindakan/obat/bhp/iol CRUD + CSV per-insurer), insurer detail (TPA parent/child inheritance), paket bedah CRUD + items + tariffs per-penjamin (auto diskon) |
| `InventoryPriceController`  | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/*` | Penentuan harga jual (HPP & HJA) per item Obat/BHP/IOL + PPN rate global. Formula `HJA = HPP × (1+margin%) × (1+ppn?)` |
| `SupplierController`        | `/inventori-farmasi/supplier/*` | CRUD supplier (autogen `SUP-NNN`); delete blocked kalau dipakai PO/GRN |
| `PurchaseOrderController`   | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/*` | CRUD Purchase Order (autogen `PO-YYYYMM-NNNN`), cancel endpoint, status enum DRAFT/SENT/PARTIAL/RECEIVED/CANCELED. Item nested |
| `GoodsReceiptController`    | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/*` | CRUD GRN (autogen `GRN-YYYYMM-NNNN`), prepare-from-PO (auto-fill `qty_remaining`), delete reverse stok. Item per-batch+expiry |
| `IntegrasiController`       | `/integrasi/*`     | Status integrasi + log VClaim/Antrean/iCare/INA-CBGs/Satu Sehat          |
| `JadwalDokterController`    | `/jadwal-dokter/*` + `/antrean-tv/dokter-aktif` (public) | CRUD jadwal mingguan dokter (Senin–Minggu × jam praktik × poliklinik × ruangan), toggle is_active, list aktif hari ini (untuk dropdown admisi + panel TV). Dynamic queue prefix `D{room}` saat dokter dipakai di Visit |
| `UserController`            | `/rbac/users/*`    | (Superadmin) CRUD user + toggle aktif + reset password — guard: tidak boleh hapus diri sendiri / Superadmin terakhir |
| `RoleController`            | `/rbac/roles/*`    | (Superadmin) CRUD role + sync permissions; proteksi role Superadmin & role yang masih dipakai user |
| `PermissionController`      | `/rbac/permissions/*` | (Superadmin) Read-only list permission (grouped per modul atau flat) — sumber matrix UI |

### 4.2 Services (`backend/app/Services/`)

Pola: controller hanya `validate()` lalu memanggil service method. Service
boleh saling memanggil (mis. `KlaimService` memanggil `InaCbgsService` untuk
grouping sebelum submit). **`QueueService` adalah orchestrator pusat**
untuk semua transisi antrian — per-station service (Admisi/Perawat/Refraksi/
Dokter/Penunjang/Bedah/Kasir/Farmasi) hanya thin wrapper yang delegate ke
`QueueService::advanceFromStation()`.

| Service                  | Dipanggil dari                 | Tanggung jawab                                              |
|--------------------------|--------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
| `AuthService`            | `AuthController`               | Login/logout JWT, refresh token, hash password              |
| `QueueService`           | `QueueController` + 8 station service | Generate queue number, **panggil (boleh re-call: WAITING/CALLED)**, mulai/lewati/batal, `advanceFromStation()` dengan matrix transisi Section 11.3, broadcast event Reverb |
| `AdmisiService`          | `AdmisiController`             | Buat Visit, **`registerVisit` SKIP antrian ADMISI** (direct admisi → enqueue langsung TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS dengan TR-NNN shared, `current_station=TRIASE`), **kiosk tiket umum** (`ambilTiketUmumKiosk`), **merge walk-in** (`daftarkanWalkIn` — auto-advance ke TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS), `selesaiAdmisi` → delegate `QueueService`, `cancelKunjungan` (boleh dari station mana pun kecuali SELESAI), `getDashboard` (incl. `cancel_count`), `generateNoRM` (retry-loop self-healing), `generateWalkInNik` |
| `PerawatService`         | `PerawatController`            | CRUD `NurseAssessment`, finalize (lock); `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` |
| `RefraksiService`        | `RefraksiController`           | `RefractionRecord` + `RefractionPrescription` + `IolRecommendation`; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` |
| `DokterService`          | `DokterController`             | `DoctorExamination` (tab2/4), `MedicalResume`; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` |
| `PenunjangService`       | `PenunjangController`          | `DiagnosticOrder` + `DiagnosticResult`; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` (balik ke DOKTER) |
| `BedahService`           | `BedahController`              | `SurgerySchedule`, `SurgeryRecord`, `SurgeryIolUsage`; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` |
| `FarmasiService`         | `FarmasiController`            | Dispensing `Prescription`, fulfillment `SurgeryRequest`; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` (end of flow). **Stok pindah** ke `inventory_stocks` (lihat `GoodsReceiptService`) — dispensing belum baca dari tabel itu, TODO FEFO. |
| `KasirService`           | `KasirController`              | Generate `BillingInvoice`, hitung COB, bayar/cancel; `selesaiAntrian` → `QueueService` |
| `KlaimService`           | `KlaimController`              | Workflow status klaim + audit log                           |
| `RekamMedisService`      | `RekamMedisController`         | `PatientDocument` + `MedicalRecordVersion` (immutable)      |
| `DashboardService`       | `DashboardController`          | Agregasi statistik dari beberapa tabel                      |
| `MasterDataService`      | `MasterDataController`         | CRUD master + CSV tindakan (header friendly tanpa kode, lookup by `nama+kategori`); `generateProcedureCode($kategori)` → `TND-NNN` per prefix |
| `TarifPaketService`      | `TarifPaketController`         | Tarif per-penjamin (CRUD + CSV per-insurer per-type), insurer parent/child inheritance, paket bedah composite (items + tariffs per-penjamin, auto-recalc `total_base_price` & `discount_amount`) |
| `InventoryPriceService`  | `InventoryPriceController`     | HPP/HJA per item Obat/BHP/IOL, PPN global singleton, formula recompute saat PPN diubah |
| `SupplierService`        | `SupplierController`           | CRUD supplier, autogen `SUP-NNN`, guard delete by FK |
| `PurchaseOrderService`   | `PurchaseOrderController`      | CRUD PO transactional (sync items delete-then-recreate), autogen `PO-YYYYMM-NNNN`, status guard (ditolak edit/delete kalau sudah ada GRN). Cancel endpoint |
| `GoodsReceiptService`    | `GoodsReceiptController`       | Create GRN transactional → upsert `inventory_stocks` per `(item_type, item_id, batch_no)` + increment `purchase_order_items.qty_received` + auto-update PO status. Delete GRN reverse stok + decrement qty_received + recompute PO status. `validateAgainstPo()` guard over-receive. Autogen `GRN-YYYYMM-NNNN` |
| `IntegrasiService`       | `IntegrasiController`          | Aggregator status integrasi + retry handler                 |
| `BpjsVClaimService`      | `KlaimService`, `AdmisiService`| Wrapper HTTP ke endpoint BPJS VClaim, log di `bpjs_vclaim_logs` |
| `BpjsAntreanService`     | `AdmisiService`                | Validasi booking + sync antrean BPJS                        |
| `InaCbgsService`         | `KlaimService`                 | Grouping INA-CBGs, log di `inacbgs_grouping_logs`           |
| `SatusehatService`       | `RekamMedisService`, `IntegrasiService` | Sync resource ke Satu Sehat, retry          |
| `JadwalDokterService`    | `JadwalDokterController`       | CRUD jadwal mingguan, list aktif hari ini (filter ISO `Carbon::isoWeekday`), toggle aktif. Query dokter pakai `whereHas('user.role', name='dokter')`. Method `queuePrefix()` di `DoctorSchedule` model: `'D' . room` |
| `PermissionService`      | `PermissionController`         | Read-only — `getAllGrouped` (per modul dengan label) + `getAll` flat |
| `RoleService`            | `RoleController`               | CRUD role + `syncPermissions`; helper `format` return `is_system` flag + `permission_keys` (sentinel `['*']` untuk Superadmin) + `user_count`; proteksi Superadmin & role yang masih dipakai |
| `UserService`            | `UserController`               | CRUD user + `toggleAktif` + `resetPassword` (auto-generate jika tidak diisi); guard tidak boleh hapus diri sendiri / Superadmin terakhir |

### 4.3 Models (`backend/app/Models/`)

Total 72 model Eloquent. Dikelompokkan per **domain klinik**, bukan
alfabetis, supaya mudah mencari saat membaca alur pasien:

- **Core / RBAC** — `User` (helper `hasPermission(key)`, `isSuperadmin()`), `Role` (`permissions()` belongsToMany, `hasPermission(key)`, `isSuperadmin()`), `Permission` (key format `{module}.{action_lower}` mis. `admisi.read`), `Employee`, `Patient`
- **Visit & Antrian** — `Visit`, `Queue`, `VisitCob`, `VisitService`
- **Clinical** — `NurseAssessment`, `RefractionRecord`, `RefractionPrescription`,
  `IolRecommendation`, `DoctorExamination`, `MedicalRecord`,
  `MedicalRecordVersion`, `MedicalResume`
- **Surgery** — `SurgerySchedule`, `SurgeryRecord`, `SurgeryRequest`,
  `SurgeryRequestBhp`, `SurgeryRequestIol`, `SurgeryIolUsage`,
  `SurgeryPackage`, `SurgeryPackageItem`, `SurgeryPackageTariff`
- **Pharmacy** — `Prescription`, `PrescriptionItem`
- **Diagnostic** — `DiagnosticOrder`, `DiagnosticResult`
- **Billing** — `BillingInvoice`, `BillingItem`, `BpjsClaim`, `ClaimAuditLog`
- **Master Data** — `Procedure`, `ProcedureCategory`, `Medication`, `BhpItem`, `IolItem`, `Insurer`,
  `Icd10Code`, `Icd9Code`, `ClinicProfile`, `DoctorSchedule`,
  `DocumentType`, `DocumentTemplate`, `DocumentNumberConfig`,
  `StationDocumentMapping`
- **Tariffs** — `ProcedureTariff`, `MedicationTariff`, `BhpTariff`, `IolTariff`
- **Inventori Farmasi** (modul standalone) — `InventoryPrice`, `InventoryPriceSetting` (PPN global), `Supplier`, `PurchaseOrder`, `PurchaseOrderItem`, `GoodsReceipt`, `GoodsReceiptItem`, `InventoryStock` (per `(item_type, item_id, batch_no)`)
- **Documents & Notification** — `PatientDocument`, `DocumentVerification`,
  `Notification`
- **Integration & Logs** — `IntegrationConfig`, `BpjsReferralIn`,
  `BpjsReferralOut`, `BpjsControlLetter`, `BpjsVClaimLog`,
  `InacbgsGroupingLog`, `SatusehatSyncLog`, `SatusehatResourceLog`,
  `SystemLog`

### 4.4 Events (`backend/app/Events/`)

Dipakai untuk push real-time ke frontend via Reverb (protokol Pusher).
Frontend dengar via `pusher-js` di store/view masing-masing.

- `AdmisiQueueUpdated` — broadcast saat antrian ADMISI berubah, channel
  `admisi-queue`. Didengar `admisiStore.js` (AdmisiView). Dua action:
  - `'added'` — dari kiosk Anjungan (`ambilTiketUmumKiosk`) saat row baru muncul
  - `'updated'` — dari `QueueService::broadcastQueueUpdate` saat panggil/selesai/dll.
- `TriaseQueueUpdated` — broadcast saat antrian TRIASE atau REFRAKSIONIS
  berubah, channel `triase-queue`. Didengar `perawatStore.js` (PerawatView) +
  `refraksiStore.js` (RefraksionisView).
- `AntreanTvUpdated` — **generic event untuk SEMUA station**
  (ADMISI/TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS/DOKTER/PENUNJANG/BEDAH/KASIR/FARMASI), channel
  `antrean-tv`. Didengar AntreanTVView. Fire dari `QueueService::broadcastQueueUpdate`
  (paralel dengan per-channel di atas) + `QueueService::enqueue` (action `'added'`
  saat row baru di-spawn lewat advance) + `AdmisiService::ambilTiketUmumKiosk`.
  Pakai ini kalau view butuh dengar SEMUA station via satu subscription.

### 4.5 Middleware & Auth — `backend/bootstrap/app.php`

```php
return Application::configure(basePath: dirname(__DIR__))
    ->withRouting(
        web:        __DIR__.'/../routes/web.php',
        api:        __DIR__.'/../routes/api.php',
        commands:   __DIR__.'/../routes/console.php',
        health:     '/up',
        apiPrefix:  'api',           // semua route api.php otomatis dapat prefix /api
    )
    ->withMiddleware(function (Middleware $middleware): void {
        $middleware->use([
            \Illuminate\Http\Middleware\HandleCors::class,
        ]);
    })
    ->withExceptions(fn (Exceptions $e) => null)
    ->create();
```

Penjelasan:
- **CORS** global (untuk dev frontend di port 5173). Konfigurasi
  origin/methods ada di `backend/config/cors.php`.
- **`auth:api` guard** dipakai via `Route::middleware('auth:api')->group(...)`
  di `routes/api.php` — di-back oleh `tymon/jwt-auth`.
- **`role` & `permission` middleware alias** (di-register di `bootstrap/app.php`):
  - `Route::middleware('role:superadmin,admisi')` — lolos jika role user ada di daftar; Superadmin selalu lolos
  - `Route::middleware('permission:admisi.write|kasir.write')` — pipe = OR; cek `User::hasPermission()` yang baca permission dari `Role::permissions` (pivot `role_permissions`). Superadmin lolos via sentinel `*`.
  - Saat ini block `/v1/rbac/*` pakai `role:superadmin`. Block lain belum di-guard (TODO Stage berikutnya).
- **Public groups (di luar `auth:api`)**: `/v1/auth/login`, `/v1/rekam-medis/templates/*`
  (template auto-generate), `/v1/anjungan/tiket-umum` (kiosk self-service),
  `/v1/antrean-tv/snapshot` + `/v1/antrean-tv/dokter-aktif` (TV display + panel dokter aktif).
- Final base URL endpoint: `/api` (dari `apiPrefix`) + `/v1` (group di
  api.php) → **`/api/v1/...`**.
- Health probe: `GET /up` (Laravel built-in, return 200 jika app siap).

---

## 5. API Routes / Endpoints

Semua route terdaftar di `backend/routes/api.php` di bawah `Route::prefix('v1')`.
Convention path memakai bahasa Indonesia (`/kunjungan`, `/antrian`,
`/pemeriksaan`) — match dengan istilah klinik. Total ±310 endpoint.

**Convention status code**:
- `200` sukses, `201` (jarang dipakai — kebanyakan response 200 dengan envelope)
- `401` JWT invalid/expired
- `403` lolos auth tapi tidak boleh aksi
- `422` validation error (format Laravel default)
- `500` exception unhandled

### 5.1 Auth (`/auth`)

Publik hanya `/login`; sisanya wajib Bearer token.

| Method | Path                  | Action                        | Purpose                                   |
|--------|-----------------------|-------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| POST   | `/auth/login`         | `AuthController@login`        | Public — tukar username/password ⇄ JWT    |
| POST   | `/auth/logout`        | `AuthController@logout`       | Invalidate token aktif                    |
| POST   | `/auth/refresh`       | `AuthController@refresh`      | Rotate JWT sebelum expired                |
| GET    | `/auth/me`            | `AuthController@me`           | Profil user current (role + employee)     |
| PUT    | `/auth/password`      | `AuthController@changePassword` | Ganti password (current + new + confirm) |

### 5.1a Anjungan Mandiri — kiosk public (`/anjungan`)

Endpoint **publik (no auth)** untuk kiosk self-service di lobby klinik
(`AnjunganView.vue`). Output: nomor antrean ADMISI tercetak. Backend buat
Patient placeholder dengan nama `"Belum Terdaftar"` + Visit + Queue, lalu
broadcast `AdmisiQueueUpdated('added')` ke channel `admisi-queue`. Petugas
admisi melengkapi identitas via `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{id}/daftarkan-walkin`
(lihat Section 5.2).

| Method | Path                       | Action                            | Purpose                                  |
|--------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| POST   | `/anjungan/tiket-umum`     | `AdmisiController@anjunganTiketUmum` | Public — buat Visit walk-in UMUM + Queue ADMISI, return `queue_number` |

NIK placeholder format: `'9' + 9-digit timestamp + 6-digit random` (16 char,
diawali `9` agar dibedakan dari NIK warga asli yang selalu kode wilayah 1-3).

### 5.1c Antrean TV — public display (`/antrean-tv`)

Endpoint **publik (no auth)** untuk TV display di lobby. Mengembalikan
snapshot semua station hari ini (sama payload dengan `GET /antrian` yang
auth-required, tapi tanpa Bearer token). Frontend `AntreanTVView.vue` fetch
ini saat mount + polling fallback 30 detik kalau WS Reverb tidak tersedia.

| Method | Path                          | Action                       | Purpose                                  |
|--------|-------------------------------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/antrean-tv/snapshot`        | `QueueController@index`                  | Public — snapshot semua station hari ini |
| GET    | `/antrean-tv/dokter-aktif`    | `JadwalDokterController@aktifHariIni`    | Public — list dokter aktif hari ini (panel "Dokter Bertugas Hari Ini" + lookup poliklinik dari prefix `D{room}`) |

### 5.1b Antrian — cross-cutting (`/antrian`)

Endpoint generic untuk operasi antrian lintas-station. Dipakai oleh
`AntreanTVView.vue` (snapshot semua station), Dashboard, dan tooling admin.
Per-station selesai/panggil tetap available di prefix masing-masing (mis.
`/dokter/antrian/{id}/selesai`); endpoint `/antrian/*` adalah generic
fallback dan TIDAK menerapkan gate validation per-station — gate ada di
`QueueService::resolveNextStation` (lihat Section 11.4).

| Method | Path                              | Action                          | Purpose                                       |
|--------|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/antrian`                        | `QueueController@index`         | Snapshot semua station hari ini (Antrean TV) |
| GET    | `/antrian/station/{station}`      | `QueueController@byStation`     | Antrian per station (A/TRIASE/.../FARMASI)   |
| GET    | `/antrian/{id}`                   | `QueueController@show`          | Detail satu baris antrian                     |
| PUT    | `/antrian/{id}/panggil`           | `QueueController@panggil`       | Panggil dari semua status aktif (WAITING/CALLED/IN_PROGRESS). Status WAITING/CALLED → CALLED; IN_PROGRESS tetap IN_PROGRESS (re-call saat pasien sedang diperiksa). `called_at` diperbarui tiap klik + broadcast Reverb. |
| PUT    | `/antrian/{id}/mulai`             | `QueueController@mulai`         | CALLED → IN_PROGRESS                          |
| PUT    | `/antrian/{id}/lewati`            | `QueueController@lewati`        | Pindah ke akhir antrean station yang sama     |
| PUT    | `/antrian/{id}/selesai`           | `QueueController@selesai`       | COMPLETED + advance ke station berikutnya     |
| PUT    | `/antrian/{id}/batal`             | `QueueController@batal`         | CANCELLED (no advance, log alasan)            |

### 5.5 Dokter (`/dokter`)

Sub-modul standalone dari Master Data. **Tarif per-penjamin** (tindakan/obat/bhp/iol) + **Metode Bayar** (insurer TPA dengan parent/child inheritance) + **Paket Bedah** (composite items + tariffs per-penjamin dengan auto-diskon).

| CRUD   | `/tarif-paket/tarif/{type}[/{id}]` (type: tindakan/obat/bhp/iol) | Tarif per-penjamin per-item. Filter wajib `insurer_id` |
| GET    | `/tarif-paket/master-price/{type}/{itemId}`                   | Live master price lookup untuk auto-fill modal tarif |
| GET    | `/tarif-paket/metode-bayar/{id}`                              | Detail insurer + tarif inheritance dari parent |
| GET/POST | `/tarif-paket/metode-bayar/{id}/tarif/{type}/{template-csv,export-csv,import-csv}` | CSV per-insurer per-type |
| CRUD   | `/tarif-paket/paket-bedah[/{id}]`                             | CRUD paket bedah                              |
| CRUD   | `/tarif-paket/paket-bedah/{paketId}/items[/{itemId}]`         | Composite items (BHP/IOL/medication/procedure dengan qty + default_price snapshot dari master, auto-recalc `total_base_price`) |
| GET/POST/DELETE | `/tarif-paket/paket-bedah/{paketId}/tariffs[/{tariffId}]` | Harga jual per-penjamin paket, auto diskon `(sum_items_at_insurer - paket_price)` |

### 5.18 Inventori Farmasi (`/inventori-farmasi`)

Modul standalone untuk operasional farmasi. Sub-menu: **Master** (Obat/BHP/IOL — UI re-route ke `/master/*`), **Penentuan Harga** (HPP & HJA), **Supplier**, **Pembelian (PO)**, **Penerimaan (GRN)**.

| Method | Path                                                   | Purpose                                       |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| GET/PUT| `/inventori-farmasi/harga/settings`                    | PPN rate global singleton (`inventory_price_settings`). Update PPN → auto recompute HJA semua row |
| GET    | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/{type}` (MEDICATION/BHP/IOL) | List item LEFT JOIN `inventory_prices` (item belum di-price tetap tampil sebagai "belum diset") |
| PUT/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/{type}/{itemId}`         | Upsert/hapus harga per item; HJA = HPP × (1+margin%) × (PPN? 1+rate : 1) |
| CRUD   | `/inventori-farmasi/supplier[/{id}]`                   | CRUD supplier; autogen `SUP-NNN`; delete blocked kalau dipakai PO/GRN |
| GET/POST | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian`                       | List PO (filter search/status/supplier/date) + Create PO |
| GET/PUT/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/{id}`            | Detail/update/delete PO. Items locked kalau sudah ada GRN. Delete ditolak kalau status PARTIAL/RECEIVED |
| POST   | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/{id}/cancel`             | Cancel PO (ditolak kalau sudah ada GRN)       |
| GET    | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/from-po/{poId}`         | Prepare GRN dari PO — return items dengan `qty_remaining` (sisa qty_ordered - qty_received). **Wajib didaftar SEBELUM `/{id}`** |
| GET/POST | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan`                      | List GRN (filter search/supplier/po_id/date) + Create GRN |
| GET/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/{id}`               | Detail/delete GRN. Delete reverse stok + recompute PO status |

**Flow PO → GRN → Stok**:
1. Create PO `DRAFT` → ubah ke `SENT` (kirim ke supplier).
2. Barang datang → create GRN (link `po_id` atau direct). Validasi `qty_received ≤ qty_remaining` per item.
3. `GoodsReceiptService::createItemAndApplyStock()`:
   - Insert `goods_receipt_items` (qty, batch_no, expiry_date wajib > today).
   - Upsert `inventory_stocks` per `(item_type, item_id, batch_no)` — increment qty_on_hand, set expiry_date & last_received_at.
   - `purchase_order_items.qty_received += qty`.
4. `updatePoStatus()`: total_received ≥ total_ordered → `RECEIVED`; partial → `PARTIAL`; semua GRN dihapus → balik ke `SENT`.
5. Delete GRN reverse semua effect di atas (stok per batch dihapus kalau qty=0).

**HPP weighted-average**: by-design NOT auto-updated dari GRN. User pilih manual via Penentuan Harga (sesuai feedback project). Hook tersedia di `GoodsReceiptService` kalau policy berubah.

### 5.15 Jadwal Dokter (`/jadwal-dokter`)

Standalone module CRUD jadwal mingguan dokter (Senin–Minggu × jam praktik
× poliklinik × ruangan). Hasil `aktifHariIni` dipakai oleh:
- Admisi (dropdown wajib pilih dokter saat registrasi → set `visits.doctor_schedule_id`)
- Antrean TV (panel "Dokter Bertugas Hari Ini" — endpoint public di Section 5.1c)
- DokterView (panel "Status Saya Hari Ini" untuk dokter login)

**Dynamic queue prefix**: saat Visit advance ke station DOKTER, `QueueService::enqueue`
membaca `visit.doctorSchedule.room` dan generate `queue_number` dengan format
`D{room}-NNN` (mis. `D1-001`, `D2-001`). Sequence di-count per prefix per hari →
D1 dan D2 bisa eksis bersamaan dengan counter independen.

| Method | Path                                | Action                                  | Purpose                                       |
|--------|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/jadwal-dokter/aktif-hari-ini`     | `JadwalDokterController@aktifHariIni`   | List jadwal aktif hari ini (filter `Carbon::isoWeekday`) — return `queue_prefix`, `nama_dokter`, `poliklinik`, `room`, `start_time`, `end_time` |
| GET    | `/jadwal-dokter`                    | `JadwalDokterController@index`          | List semua dokter + jadwal mingguan mereka, grouped per employee |
| POST   | `/jadwal-dokter`                    | `JadwalDokterController@store`          | Buat jadwal 1 hari (validasi: dokter tidak boleh punya 2 jadwal di hari sama) |
| GET    | `/jadwal-dokter/{id}`               | `JadwalDokterController@show`           | Detail satu baris jadwal                      |
| PUT    | `/jadwal-dokter/{id}`               | `JadwalDokterController@update`         | Update jadwal (partial allowed)               |
| DELETE | `/jadwal-dokter/{id}`               | `JadwalDokterController@destroy`        | Hapus jadwal                                  |
| PATCH  | `/jadwal-dokter/{id}/toggle`        | `JadwalDokterController@toggle`         | Toggle `is_active` — dokter di DokterView panel "Status Saya Hari Ini" pakai endpoint ini |

> **Catatan auth**: saat ini block `/jadwal-dokter/*` hanya di-`auth:api` (semua user login bisa akses). Belum di-guard role-spesifik (TODO Stage berikutnya).

### 5.16 RBAC — User / Role / Permission (`/rbac`)

Block khusus manajemen RBAC, **wajib role Superadmin** (`Route::middleware('role:superadmin')`).
Dipakai oleh `DataPenggunaView.vue`. Permission key format `{module}.{action_lower}` —
**23 modul × 3 aksi (R/W/D) = 69 permission rows** (lihat
`PermissionSeeder` & `RolePermissionSeeder`). Modul: `admisi`, `antrian_tv`, `perawat`, `refraksionis`, `rme_dokter`, `bedah`, `farmasi`, `gudang`, `kasir`, `bpjs`, `laporan`, `tarif_paket`, `inventori_farmasi`, `master_obat`, `master_bhp`, `master_iol`, `master_icd`, `role_akses`, `audit`, `pengaturan`, `supplier`, `pembelian`, `penerimaan`.

**Superadmin bypass**: tidak punya baris di `role_permissions`. Cek lewat
`Role::isSuperadmin()` di kode + sentinel `["*"]` di response `/auth/me`.

| Method | Path                                   | Action                              | Purpose                                                  |
|--------|----------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/rbac/permissions`                    | `PermissionController@index`        | List permission grouped per modul (matrix UI source)     |
| GET    | `/rbac/permissions/flat`               | `PermissionController@flat`         | Flat list (untuk lookup di store)                        |
| GET    | `/rbac/roles`                          | `RoleController@index`              | List role + `permission_keys` + `user_count`             |
| POST   | `/rbac/roles`                          | `RoleController@store`              | Buat role + assign `permission_ids[]`                    |
| GET    | `/rbac/roles/{id}`                     | `RoleController@show`               | Detail role                                              |
| PUT    | `/rbac/roles/{id}`                     | `RoleController@update`             | Update role + sync permissions                           |
| DELETE | `/rbac/roles/{id}`                     | `RoleController@destroy`            | Hapus role — proteksi: Superadmin tidak boleh, role dengan user > 0 tidak boleh |
| PUT    | `/rbac/roles/{id}/permissions`         | `RoleController@syncPermissions`    | Sync permissions saja (matrix tab klik-langsung-save)    |
| GET    | `/rbac/users`                          | `UserController@index`              | List user (filter: `search`, `role_id`, `is_active`)     |
| POST   | `/rbac/users`                          | `UserController@store`              | Buat user (password auto-generate kalau tidak diisi)     |
| GET    | `/rbac/users/{id}`                     | `UserController@show`               | Detail user + role + employee                            |
| PUT    | `/rbac/users/{id}`                     | `UserController@update`             | Update user                                              |
| DELETE | `/rbac/users/{id}`                     | `UserController@destroy`            | Hapus user — proteksi: tidak boleh hapus diri sendiri / Superadmin terakhir |
| PATCH  | `/rbac/users/{id}/toggle-aktif`        | `UserController@toggleAktif`        | Toggle `is_active` — proteksi: tidak boleh non-aktifkan diri sendiri |
| PUT    | `/rbac/users/{id}/reset-password`      | `UserController@resetPassword`      | Reset password — return `{new_password}` (Superadmin catat manual) |

**Default credentials seed** (`UserSeeder` v2026-05-26):
- Superadmin: `superadmin` / `Superadmin@123`
- Per-alur (dokter, perawat, refraksionis, penunjang, farmasi, kasir, verifikator, admisi): `<role>` / `888888`

**Permission key contoh** (lihat `PermissionSeeder` untuk daftar lengkap):
`admisi.read`, `admisi.write`, `admisi.delete`, `rme_dokter.read`, `kasir.write`,
`role_akses.read`, `audit.read` (R-only), `pengaturan.read`, dst.

## 6. Frontend Components

Frontend adalah SPA Vue 3 + Vite. Pola: 1 view = 1 modul HIS, 1 store Pinia
per-domain. **Tidak ada UI library eksternal** — semua komponen custom
dengan CSS scoped + design token.

**Auth guard** (`router.beforeEach`): 2 layer cek:
1. Jika `!useAuthStore().isAuthenticated` dan route bukan public
   (`['login', 'antrean-tv', 'anjungan']`) → redirect ke `/login`.
2. Jika route punya `meta.permission` (single key) atau `meta.permissions`
   (array OR) dan `!auth.can(meta.permission)` → redirect ke `/dashboard`.
   Superadmin selalu lolos via sentinel `["*"]` di `user.permissions`.

**`App.vue` onMounted** panggil `auth.fetchMe()` jika `isAuthenticated` — refresh
`user.permissions` saat reload halaman (penting karena user yang login sebelum
sistem RBAC ditambahkan akan punya `permissions: []` di localStorage).

### 6.4 Pinia Stores (`src/stores/`)

| Store               | Tanggung jawab                                                                                                |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `authStore`         | Token JWT + user profile, persist ke `localStorage`. State baru: `isSuperadmin` (boolean derived), `permissions` (array dari `/auth/me`, sentinel `["*"]` untuk Superadmin). Method `can(key)` — terima string atau array (OR logic). Listener `arumed:session-expired` untuk auto-logout |
| `visitStore`        | List Visit + filter + pagination + daftar/cancel + cari pasien                                                 |
| `admisiStore`       | Dashboard KPI admisi (incl. `cancel` count), antrian (filter zombie/CANCELLED), walk-in merge (`daftarkanWalkIn`), edit pasien (`updatePasien`), cancel kunjungan (`cancelKunjungan` — handle 404 sebagai sukses); WebSocket Reverb channel `admisi-queue` + fallback polling 30s. **Catatan**: jadwal dokter pindah ke `jadwalDokterStore` standalone |
| `perawatStore`      | Antrian triase, asesmen (draft + finalize), vital history, dokumen; WebSocket Reverb channel `triase-queue`    |
| `refraksiStore`     | Antrian refraksionis, pemeriksaan (RefractionRecord draft + finalize), resep kacamata; WebSocket Reverb channel `triase-queue` (filter station=REFRAKSIONIS) |
| `dokterStore`       | Antrian dokter, selectedQueue, panggil, selesai (advance ke PENUNJANG/BEDAH/KASIR via backend). Polling 30s (DOKTER station tidak punya event station-specific) |
| `notificationStore` | Inbox TTD dokter — sign dokumen dengan PIN, tolak dengan alasan, polling 60s                                    |
| `followUpStore`     | Kontrol ulang per hari/minggu + rollup bulanan, format helper                                                   |
| `jadwalDokterStore` | `daftarDokter` (semua dokter + jadwal mingguan), `aktifHariIni` (untuk admisi dropdown + TV), CRUD jadwal, `toggleAktif` (sync dengan DokterView panel & TV display), computed `tvPanelRows` untuk format chip TV |
| `dataPenggunaStore` | RBAC management — `users`, `roles`, `permissionGroups` (matrix source). Actions: `fetchPermissions`, `fetchRoles` + CRUD + `syncRolePermissions`, `fetchUsers` + CRUD + `toggleUserAktif` + `resetUserPassword`. `loadAll()` muat 3 endpoint paralel saat mount DataPenggunaView |
| `auth.js`           | Re-export shim ke `authStore` (legacy import path, masih ada untuk back-compat)                                |
| `queueStore.js`     | Generic queue store dengan fetch per station — **tidak di-import siapa pun**, kandidat penghapusan             |

### 6.5 HTTP Layer (`src/services/api.js`)

```js
const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1',
  timeout: 15000,
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'application/json' },
})

// Request: inject Bearer token
api.interceptors.request.use((cfg) => {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token')
  if (token) cfg.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
  return cfg
})

// Response: dispatch custom event berdasarkan status
api.interceptors.response.use(null, (err) => {
  const s = err.response?.status
  if (s === 401)  window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:session-expired'))
  if (s === 403)  window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:forbidden', { detail: err }))
  if (s >= 500)   window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:server-error', { detail: err }))
  return Promise.reject(err)
})
```

Helper grouping per-domain:
`authApi`, `queueApi`, `visitApi`, `notifApi`, `followUpApi`, `perawatApi`,
`refraksiApi`, `dokterApi`, `penunjangApi`, `bedahApi`, `farmasiApi`,
`kasirApi`, `klaimApi`, `rekamMedisApi`, `dashboardApi`, `masterApi` (+`masterApi.supplier`),
`admisiApi`, `integrasiApi`, `anjunganApi`, `antreanTvApi`,
`jadwalDokterApi`, `userApi`, `roleApi`, `permissionApi`,
**`tarifPaketApi`** (tarif/insurer/paketBedah), **`inventoriHargaApi`** (HPP/HJA + PPN settings),
**`pembelianApi`** (PO CRUD + cancel), **`penerimaanApi`** (GRN CRUD + prepareFromPo) —
masing-masing object dengan method yang memetakan ke endpoint backend
(lihat Section 5).

Helper terbaru (revisi 4 — 2026-05-26):
- `anjunganApi.tiketUmum()` → `POST /anjungan/tiket-umum` (no auth, kiosk)
- `admisiApi.daftarkanWalkIn(visitId, data)` → `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{visitId}/daftarkan-walkin`
- `admisiApi.cancelKunjungan(id)` → `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{id}/cancel`
- `admisiApi.showPasien(id)` / `admisiApi.updatePasien(id, data)` — edit pasien dari card "Siap Dipanggil"
- `antreanTvApi.dokterAktif()` → `GET /antrean-tv/dokter-aktif` (no auth, untuk panel TV)
- `jadwalDokterApi.list / aktifHariIni / show / create / update / remove / toggle` — endpoint `/jadwal-dokter/*` standalone
- `userApi.list / show / create / update / remove / toggleAktif / resetPassword` — endpoint `/rbac/users/*` (Superadmin)
- `roleApi.list / show / create / update / remove / syncPermissions` — endpoint `/rbac/roles/*`
- `permissionApi.list / flat` — read-only `/rbac/permissions/*`

## 7. Database Tables

Backend memakai 96 migration. Default connection: **PostgreSQL** (`DB_CONNECTION=pgsql`, db: `arumed_apps`) per memory project. SQLite tetap supported untuk dev cepat. Lihat `backend/config/database.php` untuk override via `.env`.

Tabel dikelompokkan per domain — sejajar dengan grouping model di Section 4.3.

| `jobs`   | `0001_01_01_000002_create_jobs_table`      | Queue driver `database`         |

## 8. API Request/Response Format

Semua endpoint REST mengembalikan **envelope JSON standar** — pola ini
ditegaskan di komentar header `routes/api.php` dan implementasi
`AuthController`.

### 8.1 Envelope Standar

```json
{
  "success": true,         // boolean — true jika operasi sukses
  "data":    { ... },      // object | array | null — payload utama
  "message": "Login berhasil",  // string — pesan utk user (BIPA)
  "errors":  null          // object | null — detail field error (umumnya 422)
}
```

### 8.2 Sample — Login

```http
POST /api/v1/auth/login
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "username": "admin",
  "password": "secret123"
}
```

Response 200 OK:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "access_token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...",
    "token_type": "bearer",
    "expires_in": 3600,
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "username": "admin",
      "name": "Administrator",
      "role": { "id": 1, "name": "admin" },
      "employee": { "id": 1, "name": "Dr. ..." }
    }
  },
  "message": "Login berhasil",
  "errors": null
}
```

Response 401 Unauthorized (kredensial salah):

```json
{ "success": false, "data": null, "message": "Kredensial salah", "errors": null }
```

> Frontend: simpan `data.access_token` di `localStorage` sebagai
> `auth_token`. Setiap request setelahnya wajib header
> `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

### 8.3 Sample — Authenticated Request

```http
GET /api/v1/admisi/dashboard
Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...
Accept: application/json
```

### 8.3a Sample — Anjungan Kiosk (Public, No Auth)

```http
POST /api/v1/anjungan/tiket-umum
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json
```

Response 201 Created:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "queue_number": "A-007",
    "queue_id":     "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "visit_id":     "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "patient_id":   "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "no_rm":        "2026050007",
    "station":      "ADMISI"
  },
  "message": "Tiket umum diterbitkan",
  "errors": null
}
```

### 8.4 Sample — Validation Error (422)

Mengikuti format default Laravel (BUKAN envelope kustom — exception
`ValidationException` di-handle Laravel sebelum sempat dibungkus controller):

```json
{
  "message": "The username field is required.",
  "errors": {
    "username": ["The username field is required."]
  }
}
```

> Catatan: dua format berdampingan ini wajar di Laravel — envelope kustom
> hanya saat controller mengembalikan response, sedangkan validation error
> tetap pakai format framework. Frontend perlu handle keduanya.

### 8.5 Sample — Error Server (5xx)

Response interceptor di frontend akan **dispatch event**
`arumed:server-error` — store/komponen bisa subscribe untuk tampilkan toast
global, sambil error tetap di-reject dari promise call asalnya.

## 9. Integration Points

Catatan operasional untuk integrasi pihak ketiga — wajib dibaca sebelum
menyentuh modul BPJS/Satu Sehat.

| Integrasi              | Service Class           | Tabel Log                | Endpoint Utama                                  |
|------------------------|-------------------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| **BPJS VClaim**        | `BpjsVClaimService`     | `bpjs_vclaim_logs`       | `/admisi/bpjs/*`, `/klaim/{id}/submit`          |
| **BPJS Antrean**       | `BpjsAntreanService`    | `bpjs_antrean_logs`      | `/admisi/bpjs/validasi-booking`                 |
| **BPJS iCare**         | (dalam `IntegrasiService`) | `bpjs_icare_logs`     | `/klaim/icare/monitoring`                       |
| **BPJS INA-CBGs**      | `InaCbgsService`        | `inacbgs_grouping_logs`  | `/klaim/{id}/grouping`                          |
| **Satu Sehat (Kemkes)**| `SatusehatService`      | `satusehat_sync_logs`, `satusehat_resource_logs` | `/integrasi/satusehat/*` |
| **Laravel Reverb (WS)**| `App\Events\*`          | —                        | broadcast otomatis saat queue update            |

**Catatan operasional**:
- Semua HTTP call ke pihak ketiga harus melalui Service class — jangan
  langsung dari controller (memudahkan retry & logging).
- Setiap call wajib menulis log ke tabel `*_logs` terkait (request, response,
  status code, timestamp). Tabel log adalah satu-satunya sumber audit ke
  vendor saat dispute.
- **Reverb (WebSocket)** opsional di dev — frontend punya **fallback polling
  30s** di `queueStore`, `admisiStore`, `perawatStore` jika WS gagal connect.
- **Klaim BPJS** sekali `submit` tidak bisa dibatalkan — frontend wajib
  modal konfirmasi (lihat `KlaimView` pattern).

## 10. Development Setup

### 10.1 Quick Start

```bash
# === Backend ===
cd backend
composer install
cp .env.example .env
php artisan key:generate
php artisan jwt:secret              # WAJIB — set JWT_SECRET
php artisan migrate --seed          # buat schema + seed master data
php artisan serve                   # http://localhost:8000

# === Frontend (terminal lain) ===
cd arumed-frontend
npm install
npm run dev                         # http://localhost:5173
```

### 10.2 One-Shot Dev (Concurrently)

`composer dev` di `backend/composer.json` menjalankan 4 proses paralel
dengan `npx concurrently`:

| Nama   | Command                                                  | Untuk                    |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| server | `php artisan serve`                                      | API server               |
| queue  | `php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0`         | Job worker               |
| logs   | `php artisan pail --timeout=0`                           | Tail log real-time       |
| vite   | `npm run dev`                                            | Frontend HMR             |

### 10.3 Catatan Operasional

- **Database default**: SQLite (auto-created saat `composer setup`).
  Production: ganti `DB_CONNECTION=pgsql` + isi `DB_HOST`/`DB_DATABASE`/dll
  di `.env` lalu re-migrate.
- **CORS**: dev frontend di port 5173 sudah whitelisted via `config/cors.php`
  + global middleware `HandleCors`. Production: update `allowed_origins`.
- **WebSocket Reverb**: belum dikonfigurasi di `.env.example`. Jika dipakai,
  set `BROADCAST_DRIVER=reverb` + `REVERB_*` keys, lalu jalankan
  `php artisan reverb:start`.
- **JWT TTL**: default `JWT_TTL=60` (menit) — refresh via
  `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` sebelum expired.
- **Health check**: `GET /up` (200 OK jika app booted) — dipakai monitoring.

## 11. Alur Layanan (Service Flow / Patient Journey)

Section ini mendeskripsikan **alur antrean pasien end-to-end** — dari masuk
klinik sampai pulang. Setiap tahap layanan direpresentasikan oleh satu atau
lebih baris `queues` (lihat Section 7 schema), dan **semua transisi antar
station di-orkestrasi oleh `QueueService::advanceFromStation()`**. Per-
station service (Admisi/Perawat/Refraksi/Dokter/Penunjang/Bedah/Kasir/
Farmasi) hanya thin wrapper yang delegate ke `QueueService`, plus melakukan
gate validation (mis. Triase wajib finalize asesmen sebelum advance). Setiap
transisi men-trigger event Reverb sehingga `AntreanTVView.vue` update real-
time.

### 11.1 Stasiun Antrean (Queue Stations)

Konstanta `Queue::STATIONS` di model (`backend/app/Models/Queue.php`) +
field `station` di tabel `queues`. **Tahap Triase + Refraksionis (TR
conceptual) di-implementasi sebagai DUA baris `queues` paralel**
(`station=TRIASE` dan `station=REFRAKSIONIS`) yang share `visit_id` —
perawat & refraksionis kerja independen, dan transisi ke DOKTER hanya
terjadi setelah **kedua** sub-task finalize.

| Kode    | Station        | Prefix | View                  | Catatan                          |
|---------|----------------|--------|-----------------------|----------------------------------|
| `A`     | ADMISI         | `A`    | `AdmisiView.vue`      |                                  |
| `T` + `R` | TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS | `T` / `R` | `PerawatView.vue` + `RefraksionisView.vue` | 2 baris paralel, share `visit_id`, gate-ke-D=AND |
| `D`     | DOKTER         | `D`    | `DokterView.vue`      |                                  |
| `P`     | PENUNJANG      | `P`    | `PenunjangView.vue`   | Opsional (jika ada DiagnosticOrder open) |
| `B`     | BEDAH          | `B`    | `BedahView.vue`       | Opsional (planning=BEDAH **dan** jadwal HARI INI) |
| `K`     | KASIR          | `K`    | `KasirView.vue`       |                                  |
| `F`     | FARMASI        | `F`    | `FarmasiView.vue`     | Opsional (skip jika tidak ada Prescription open) |

> **Status `queues.status`** lifecycle: `WAITING → CALLED → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED`
> (atau `CANCELLED`). Skip pakai action `lewati` yang reset `queue_sequence`
> ke akhir tanpa ubah status. Konstanta: `Queue::STATUS_*`,
> `Queue::ACTIVE_STATUSES`, helper `Queue::prefixFor($station)`.

### 11.2 Diagram Alur

```
                       ┌─────────────────────────┐
                       │  KIOSK / ANJUNGAN       │
                       │  (AnjunganView.vue)     │
                       └────────────┬────────────┘
                                    │
              ┌─────────────────────┼────────────────────────┐
              │                                              │
   Pasien BPJS + (Kode Booking / Nomor Rujukan):     Pasien BARU / UMUM /
   • masuk langsung ke TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS         ASURANSI / LAINNYA
   • jika BPJS Bridging AKTIF → POST ke antrean      (Klik "Umum / Pasien
     Dokter di WSBPJS (sinkronisasi BPJS Antrean)      Baru" di kiosk →
              │                                       POST /anjungan/tiket-umum
              │                                       → Patient placeholder
              │                                         "Belum Terdaftar"
              │                                         + Visit + Queue ADMISI)
              │ skip admisi                                  ▼
              │                                  ┌─────────────────────┐
              │                                  │  ANTREAN ADMISI (A) │
              │                                  │  AdmisiView.vue     │
              │                                  │  • Walk-in: badge   │
              │                                  │    WALK-IN, tombol  │
              │                                  │    Panggil → CALLED │
              │                                  │    → Daftarkan      │
              │                                  │    (merge data +    │
              │                                  │    auto-advance)    │
              │                                  └──────────┬──────────┘
              │                                             │ selesai daftar
              │                                             │ (atau walk-in
              │                                             │  merge auto-advance)
              │                                             ▼
              └────────────────────────►┌──────────────────────────────┐
                                        │  TRIASE (T)  ║ REFRAKSIONIS  │
                                        │  PerawatView ║ RefraksionisView (R)
                                        │  2 baris queues paralel,     │
                                        │  share visit_id              │

                                                       │ GATE:
                                                       │ NurseAssessment.is_finalized
                                                       │ AND RefractionRecord.is_finalized
                                                       │ (partner selesai = NO_OP)

        ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
        │                  ANTREAN DOKTER (D)                        │

                                       │ DOKTER selesai → resolveNextStation:

                          │            │                 │

              ┌─────────────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐
              │ PENUNJANG (P)   │ │  BEDAH (B)   │ │ KASIR (K)   │
              │ ada Diagnostic- │ │ planning=    │ │ default     │
              │ Order open      │ │ BEDAH +      │ │             │
              └─────────┬───────┘ │ schedule     │ └──────┬──────┘
                        │         │ HARI INI     │        │
                        │ kembali │              │        │ bayar selesai
                        └─→ D     └──────┬───────┘        ▼
                                         │       ┌──────────────────┐
```
